package.name: hailo_detector
package.description: ROS 2 Jazzy package for Hailo-accelerated object detection on Raspberry Pi. A C++ node wraps the rpicam-apps / Hailo YOLOv6 post-processing pipeline and publishes detection results as vision_msgs/Detection2DArray. A Python Tkinter GUI node subscribes to that topic and visualises the live detections.
